commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Tool Search catalog compaction to snapshot tool metadata and skip unreadable catalog entries while preserving healthy sibling tools and client-side catalog counts.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +26. Total +62 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main dereferences tool metadata while constructing catalog entries, and a throwing descriptor can abort the compaction loop before healthy siblings are registered.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer handling for a draft, protected-label PR plus normal pre-land validation.

target.title: fix(agents): skip unreadable tool search catalog entries
target.body:
## Summary

- Snapshot Tool Search catalog tool metadata before registering hidden catalog entries.
- Skip a single catalog target when its name/schema descriptor is unreadable, while still cataloging healthy sibling tools.
- Apply the same filtering to client-side catalog appends so skipped entries are not registered as `undefined` and counts stay honest.

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-next185-rebase1 nodenv exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/tool-search.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `nodenv exec node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/tool-search.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

Behavior addressed: Tool Search catalog compaction could crash on one plugin tool with an unreadable schema descriptor before healthy sibling tools were cataloged behind the search controls.

Real environment tested: local linked OpenClaw worktree on Node via `nodenv`, rebased on current `origin/main`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Tool Search Vitest file, targeted oxlint, diff whitespace check, and branch autoreview commands listed above.

Evidence after fix: Vitest passed 26 tests in `src/agents/tool-search.test.ts`; oxlint exited 0; `git diff --check` exited 0; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings and `overall: patch is correct (0.83)`.

Observed result after fix: a tool with an unreadable `parameters` getter is skipped from the hidden Tool Search catalog, and the healthy sibling remains cataloged with the control tool still visible.

What was not tested: broad `pnpm check:changed` could not run because `blacksmith testbox list --all` reported unauthenticated and AWS Crabbox returned coordinator 401 for `/v1/runs` and `/v1/leases`.
target.author: vincentkoc
